jobs.title: Account Executive - Commercial - Fixed Term Contract (Maternity)
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>We are a global team of innovators and pioneers dedicated to shaping the future of observability. At New Relic, we build an intelligent platform that empowers companies to thrive in an AI-first world by ensuring their software operates reliably.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Account Executive partners with Sales Engineering & Customer Success to grow the New Relic One unified observability footprint across enterprise cohorts in EMEA.</p>

jobs.title: Account Executive - Commercial
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>We are a global team of innovators and pioneers dedicated to shaping the future of observability. The Enterprise team owns the New Relic One unified observability platform pipeline across Fortune 500 cohorts.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Account Executive partners with Enterprise Sales and Customer Success to grow the New Relic One enterprise-observability footprint across Fortune 500 cohorts.</p>
